name: Anomalous Activities (Unnatural Habit)
description:
This shit was literally the only idea I had while playing A-888.

Just a simple Anomalous activities/A-888 rpg I thought about.

Characters:

Anomalies/Terrors

Subject (Tell me, if you were to have intercourse with an invisible being would your penis disappear once you penetrated? Or would it just show? Because if so then would the cum just outline their cervix?)

Night Demon (Did you know that the more angrier a person is the more dominant they get? Yes? Good because this one will force intercourse on demand, even when it’s a female.)

Grave Mother (Mommy Issues? I Do Not Care, most people with mommy kinks were raised around women, but for some reason want a dominant mommy to nurture them.)

Corpseflower (Others may say they yearn for a mysterious being with huge bewbz to smother them, till they find this abomination. Also this one will bite.)

String Oni (Just a small terror concept I had, this one is ranged and can capture others.)

Corpsewalkers (I despise these thing bro, each time I try playing the subject just spams these with grave mother and then somehow lures me in a room to get torn apart.)

MERCs:

Yoshika (Why does it take you two minutes to extract? You went to McDonald’s? THIS IS A HIGH-VALUE MISSION AND YOU WENT TO GET FAST FOOD?)

Agni (Yeah I added you in for being so kind!1!1!!!!)

Kenna (You took my food again! “BANG BANG BANG BANG.”)

Pulse (She will preform heart surgery mid fight.)

Mymy (Ongezellig??? Yeah I saw this one on a game.)
